title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED AND ELEVEN, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS."

chunks.text:
H. No. 6821 / 53 OG No. 22, 8032 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1999, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED AND ELEVEN, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item B-362.12, appendix A, title B, Highways (Feeder and Secondary Roads), page one hundred sixty-eight-A, for the Province of Negros Oriental, of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred and eleven is hereby amended to read as follows:

"B-362.12:

Doldol Junction-Bontod Feeder Roadâ5 Kms. New road

:GR :75.00 :50.00: :

:10.00 :30.00 :100.00: : :25.00: : 1 :;"

SEC. 2. Item B-362.17, appendix A, title B, Highways (Feeder and Secondary Roads), page one hundred seventy-A, for the Province of Negros Oriental, of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred and eleven is hereby amended to read as follows:

"B-362.17:

Lipayo-Mag-aso-Kanghangin Feeder Road, DauinâConstructionâ7 kms.

:GR :105 :105 :35 :20:

:10 : : : : : 1: :"

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
